zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen Campbell於大約1357年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，她的父親Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow48歲，母親Mary Isabella Lamont40歲。她於1373年3月30日與Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox在蘇格蘭斯林史爾結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1434年之前在她的家鄉，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen Campbell于大约1357年出生在英国苏格兰时，她的父亲Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow48岁，母亲Mary Isabella Lamont40岁。她于1373年3月30日与Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox在苏格兰斯林史爾结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1434年之前在她的家乡，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen Campbell was born about 1357, in Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow, was 48 and her mother, Mary Isabella Lamont, was 40. She married Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox on 30 March 1373, in Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died before 1434, in her hometown, and was buried in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen Campbell est née environ 1357, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Mary Isabella Lamont, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox le 30 mars 1373, à Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1434, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helen Campbell um 1357 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow 48 und ihre Mutter Mary Isabella Lamont 40. Sie hat am 30. März 1373 in Stirlingshire, Scotland Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1434 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Campbell è nata il circa 1357 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Mary Isabella Lamont, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox il 30 marzo 1373, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì prima del 1434, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Campbellが約1357年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochowは48歳，母Mary Isabella Lamontは40歳であった。1373年3月30日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアでSir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1434年以前に故郷で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングにて埋葬された。

ko.Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 올를e아스
ko.lifeSummary: Helen Campbell(이)가 대략 1357년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Isabella Lamont(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1373년 3월 30일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Campbell nasceu aproximadamente 1357, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Mary Isabella Lamont, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox em 30 de março de 1373, em Stirlingshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1434, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France: орлeанс, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen Campbell родилась около 1357 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Isabella Lamont, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox 30 марта 1373 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 1434 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helen Campbell nació aproximadamente 1357, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Mary Isabella Lamont, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox el 30 de marzo de 1373, en Stirlingshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió antes de 1434, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland.
